_original_description: This skill provides access to Perplexity's AI search models through Claude. It offers multiple search modes from quick facts to deep research, with clear examples for each use case. The documentation explains when to use each model and includes practical parameter options.

name: repo-research-analyst
author: parcadei
description: Analyze repository structure, patterns, conventions, and documentation for understanding a new codebase
description_zh: 该技能系统分析代码仓库结构、规范和贡献模式。遵循四步研究流程，检查文档、模板和代码模式，生成详细Markdown报告。帮助开发者快速理解陌生代码库。
_original_description: This skill systematically analyzes code repositories to identify structure, conventions, and contribution patterns. It follows a four-step research process examining documentation, templates, and code patterns, then generates a detailed markdown handoff with findings. It helps developers understand unfamiliar codebases quickly.

name: repoprompt
author: parcadei
description: Use RepoPrompt CLI for token-efficient codebase exploration
description_zh: 用于代码库探索的CLI工具，提供令牌高效的操作。包括文件树查看、代码结构分析、带上下文的搜索和文件切片功能，以最小化令牌使用。集成RepoPrompt的AI功能进行聊天和上下文构建。
_original_description: A CLI tool for exploring codebases with token-efficient operations. Provides file tree views, code structure analysis, search with context, and file slicing to minimize token usage. Integrates with RepoPrompt's AI features for chat and context building.

name: research
author: parcadei
description: Document codebase as-is with thoughts directory for historical context
description_zh: 一个专门用于记录代码库现状的Claude技能。它通过协调并行子代理来定位、分析和综合信息，严格扮演'记录员'角色，禁止提出改进建议。最终生成包含元数据、文件引用和来自thoughts目录历史上下文的结构化研究文档。
_original_description: A specialized Claude skill that documents existing codebases by coordinating parallel sub-agents to locate, analyze, and synthesize information. It enforces a strict 'documentarian' role, forbidding suggestions for improvement. Outputs structured research documents with metadata, file references, and historical context from a thoughts directory.

name: research-agent
author: parcadei
description: Research agent for external documentation, best practices, and library APIs via MCP tools
description_zh: 该技能通过MCP工具自动执行研究任务，收集文档、最佳实践和API信息。它遵循结构化流程，从理解研究需求到创建包含发现、代码示例和建议的交接文档。
_original_description: This skill automates research tasks by using MCP tools (Nia, Perplexity, Firecrawl) to gather documentation, best practices, and API information. It follows a structured process from understanding research needs to creating handoff documents with findings, code examples, and recommendations.

name: research-external
author: parcadei
description: External research workflow for docs, web, APIs - NOT codebase exploration

name: residues
author: parcadei
description: Problem-solving strategies for residues in complex analysis

name: resume-handoff
author: parcadei
description: Resume work from handoff document with context analysis and validation
description_zh: 该技能通过读取交接文档、分析引用文件、验证当前状态并创建行动计划，帮助开发者从交接文档中恢复工作。它支持工单号或直接文件路径，并行启动研究任务，并在开始实施前展示分析结果。
_original_description: This skill helps developers resume work from handoff documents by reading the document, analyzing referenced files, validating current state, and creating an action plan. It handles ticket numbers or direct file paths, spawns parallel research tasks, and presents findings before proceeding with implementation.

name: validate-agent
author: parcadei
description: Validation agent that validates plan tech choices against current best practices
description_zh: 一个验证代理，通过提取技术选择、进行网络搜索，对照2024-2025年最佳实践来检查技术计划。它生成结构化的验证报告，包含明确的状态和建议。
_original_description: A validation agent that checks technical plans against current best practices by extracting tech choices, researching via web search, and assessing them against 2024-2025 standards. It produces structured validation reports with clear statuses and recommendations.

name: patterns
author: pchalasani
description: Design patterns for the Langroid multi-agent LLM framework. Covers agent configuration, tools, task control, and integrations.
description_zh: Langroid多智能体LLM框架的设计模式集合。提供代理配置、工具处理、任务控制和MCP集成的具体示例。每个模式包含明确的使用场景和完整代码实现参考。
_original_description: A collection of design patterns for the Langroid multi-agent LLM framework. Provides concrete examples for agent configuration, tool handling, task control, and MCP integration. Each pattern includes specific use cases and references to complete code implementations.

name: changelog-generator
author: peterfei
description: 智能变更日志生成器 - 自动分析Git提交历史，生成符合规范的CHANGELOG.md。支持语义化版本管理、多种输出格式、增量更新和GitHub/GitLab集成。

name: drawnote-skill
author: peterfei
description: 智能笔记与流程图绘制工具（优化版-无权限读取）。根据用户提供的内容，自动生成精美的可视化笔记和流程图，支持多种风格(手写笔记、思维导图、流程图等)，并导出为图片。使用内置模板，无需读取文件权限。适用于：(1) 学习笔记可视化，(2) 知识梳理与总结，(3) 流程图绘制，(4) 概念解释图表

name: softcopyright
author: peterfei
description: 智能软件著作权申请材料生成工具。自动分析项目源码，生成符合软著申请要求的软件说明书和源代码文档。支持关键词搜索、智能源码分析、格式化输出和PDF导出。

name: tidymydesktop
author: peterfei
description: 智能桌面和目录整理工具。根据用户提示词自动分类、整理文件和应用程序图标，去除重复版本，生成整理报告。支持整理桌面或指定目录。

name: ccg-latent
author: phuongrealmax
description: Use this skill for multi-step development tasks. Latent Chain Mode reduces token usage by 70-80% through hidden-state reasoning with 4-phase workflow: analysis → plan → impl → review.
